findings.lessonTitle: How Does the Web Actually Work?
findings.finding: Complete HTTP fundamentals coverage. 4 content blocks explaining request-response cycle.
findings.details: Good visual representation of HTTP flow. DNS explanation included. HTTP/2 note is current.

findings.lessonTitle: REST APIs - The Standard for Web Services
findings.finding: Comprehensive REST principles. 7 content blocks covering methods, status codes, JSON.
findings.details: Good coverage of HTTP methods mapping to CRUD. Idempotency concept explained well.

findings.finding: Uses java.net.http.HttpClient (Java 11+) - correct modern API. 6 content blocks.
findings.details: Properly emphasizes HttpClient over deprecated HttpURLConnection. Virtual threads mention is accurate for Java 25.
findings.note: Content mentions HttpClient is built-in since Java 11 - correct for target Java 25

findings.finding: All code examples use java.net.http.* package correctly
findings.details: HttpClient.newHttpClient(), HttpRequest.Builder, HttpResponse.BodyHandlers all modern patterns.

findings.finding: Content mentions virtual threads integration - accurate for Java 25 context
findings.details: HttpClient uses virtual threads by default in modern Java versions.
